TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Ni-ku-luo. Ma-ci-wi-liÂ∞ºÂè§Ê¥õ¬∑È¶¨Âü∫Á∂≠Âà© = nikaudipÁîüÊ∂Ø pilecuhan ni Ma-ci-wi-li itida i E'-ta-li' Fuo-luo-lun-se, u binkusi ku wama nida i tawya, tusa ku kakana cacay ku sabama. caay ka tineng ku aydaay a tademaw tu ci Ma-ci-wi-li a wawa nu waywayan, nika kapahay ku nicudadan nida tu La-tin-wen atu E'-ta-li-wen a nikuwyikuan. . sassing i Fuo-luo-lun-se a Ma-ci-wi-li pilecuhan ni Ma-ci-wi-li kalawlawan i tawya, u Ciw-cun-kuo u satabakiay nu hitayan, sasiidaay a E'-ta'-li Cen-pan hacacay han nu icelangay a kanatalan mahida u Fa-kuo, Si-pan-ya atu Sen-seng-Luo-ma-ti-kuo debungan. tawyaay nu icelangay nu kanatalan sawsawni a masumad, masakaputay nu hitayan sawni masumad tu ku kakitidaan, u sihu hina pinaay a lipayan patideng tu alahican belihen tu. . itida i caylim tupic mihcaan Luo-ma-se taydan nu Sen-seng-luo-ma tikuo a hitay midebung, uyni nu caytu a secian sayaway nu Luo-ma debungan nu De-yi-ce a hitayya. kacinlawan a Luo-ma macimacian mahida u Fu-luo-lun-se atu Ze'-nay-ya malecadtu a debungan, amica ci Ma-ci-wi-li itida i Fuo-luo-lun-se pidebunga mapataytu i tawya. nika i mahiniay a nikaudipay, nika ci Ma-ci-wi-li idaw ku nipahabay nida tu sakay kitakida u sakasikawawan a cen-ce atu nuhitayan a tinengan. Âú®1527 . itida i caysip siwsip mihcaan, mikuwanay tu Fuo-luo-lun-se enem a bataan a May-ti-ci-cia-cu kabelinna tu, kilul sa miwawiesay u Ciw-cun Ya-li-san-ta liuse a siwse ci Sa-fuo-na-luo-la patideng tu kunhekuo, mililiday makaala tu sepatay a mihcaan, micidek ku nipikuwan ni Sa-fuo-na-lu-la, misawacu tu binawla, belineng nutaw, tuduhen nutaw sa mapatay. nikuda ci Suo-de-li-ni ku pacici mikuwan tu Fuo-luo-lun-se kunhekuo. Âú®1494Âπ¥, . caysip siwwal mihcan ci Ma-ci-ya-wi-li mala Fuo-luo-lun-se kunhekuo sakatusa a sakakaay, mikawaw tu kunhekuo sakalihalay nu cacay a bataan nu tademawan nu misu, tamudungen nida ku sasakay putah atu hitay, hina tahekal i nutawan a kanatalan, yadah tu ku nikalitemuhan nida tu mililiday tu kanatalan a tademawan, sisa mala Fuo-luo-lun-se sakakaay kanamuhan a tademawan. maadih nida ku Fuo-luo-lun-se a hitay caay ka kelec ku nipikuwan, patideng tu kanatalay a tademaw malahitay. 1498 . caylim seplim mihcaan Fuo-luo-lun-se mihang patideng tu kuomin hitay, patideng tu kuomin siwa nu tademaw mituduay a wiyun, ci Ma-ci-wi-li mala misu, caylim sepnem patideng tu adidiay nu hitayan midebung tu Pi-sa a kalepacawan, mililid tu hitay, tayda miucul malepacaw, sadikuday caylim sepsiw mihcaan u Pi-sa mikusang tu Fuo-luo-lun-se. 1505 . itini i Sen-sen'-luo-ma-ti'-kuo hunti atu ciwcun masasuutiih, tacuwacuwa musakau, mangalay palukapah, caay papilihidaai ci Fuo-luo-lun-se tu sakaypacaw, micunus tu sakay tuudan nu kalepacawan. imahini idaw ka tinengan ni Ma-ci-wi-li tu E'-ta-li a cen-ce-ciw atu hitay ci Cei-sa-lia.puo-ci-ya, madateng nida ku namaka balucuay nida misaahebual tu lala' micukaymas a tuudan tu sapikuwanan, mahemek ci nida. . katukuh satu tu caylim caytu mihcaan walu a bulat taydani ni Ma-ci-wi-li i Pi-sa, nikaydaan tu kahicahica nu sasibutan nu lepacawan, ci May-ti-ci lumaan itida i Zu-lea ese a hitay niedapan midebung tu Fuo-luo-lun-se, kunhekuo malawpes tu. ci Cia-fan-ni.May-ti-ci mala Fuo-luo-lun-se takun, naw malasakakaay nu kunhekuo a Ma-ci-wi-li palawpesen tu ku buis nida, itini i caylim caylu mihcaan mihantayan ku cumi nida ku sakapulul, sawacuen mutiik, sadikuday patahekalen pakunida han pahuting. . nai' tu ku cancanan nida i tawya, tida satu ci nida i Fuo-luo-lun-se mibatad tu pitu a nabatadan a Sen-an-de-li-ya mueneng, malingatu misulit tu cudad, idaw ku nipatingami nida tu cabayan nida sakamusa: "sangsangdep, makatukuh kaku i luma' nu sapisulit a takalan, cumud sakaku hulaken nu maku ku sianabuhay a sakiliwmah nu maku a dikucan, paliyunen nu maku tu sakay siidaay a dikucan, mahida u talumaay yaca kaku i kuntin, malitemuh nu maku ku nalitemuhan a tademaw, u nika namuh nu heni i takuwan, patahekal tu nu cacayay a kakanen. . pakunida sa kaku masasakamu atu nu heni, palita tu nu henian tu sakay cence a kawawan, kapah ku nipatubeli nuheni i takuwan, nai' ku ngelungelu' aca nu maku, haminen nu maku mipawan ku cakenuh. u pakuyuc nai' ku biyalaw nu maku, milabu kaku tu siidaay nu tahudan a kitakidan, na sakamusa ci Dan-kun : " ninanaman a tineng sipakay balucu'en, duma a kawawan nai' tu ku laheci sa. . itida ci nida i "fuo-luo-lun-se-sei" musakamu tu tawyaay a fuo-luo-lun-se tademaw, " u nikasidikucan tu demidemiadan, mikilihalay tu tuas nuheni, idumaan tu nipalawpesan macunus, pidangan tu nipatahekal tu kalisiw, tasalamaan atu sakay tataynaan a demiadan atu kalisiwan macunus, nuheni a mukti mangalay misakapah tu nikasidikucan, kya kapah ku wayway a musakamu. cima ku satinengay a mipaduka ci nidaan, cima tu ku satinengay a tademawan sa. caylim tupic mihcaan, Fuo-lu-lun-se masasungaay tu kun-he, ci Ma-ci-wi-li mangalay pakakapah tu Fuo-lu-lun-se kunhekuo, nika namisakapah henay tu May-ti-ci a luma'an, caay kedai nu kun-he-kuo, sadikuda hida satu mapatay lima a bataan idaw ku walu nu mihcaan nida i dawya. 1527Âπ¥, .
S.PHON: = ni-ku-r~…æuo. ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi******** = nikaudip** pir~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ni ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi itida i …ô î~ °-ta-r~…æi î~ ° fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô, u binkusi ku wama nida i tawja, tusa ku kakana ¶a ¶aj ku sabama. ¶aaj ka tin…ô≈ã ku ajdaaj a tad…ômaw tu ¶i ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi a wawa nu wajwajan, nika kapaƒßaj ku ni ¶udadan nida tu r~…æa-tin-w…ôn atu …ô î~ °-ta-r~…æi-w…ôn a nikuwjikuan. . sassi≈ã i fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô a ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi pir~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ni ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi kar~…æawr~…æawan i tawja, u ¶iw- ¶un-kuo u satabakiaj nu ƒßitajan, sasiidaaj a …ô î~ °-ta î~ °-r~…æi ¶…ôn-pan ƒßa ¶a ¶aj ƒßan nu i ¶…ôr~…æa≈ãaj a kanatar~…æan maƒßida u fa-kuo, si-pan-ja atu s…ôn-s…ô≈ã-r~…æuo-ma-ti-kuo d…ôbu≈ãan. tawjaaj nu i ¶…ôr~…æa≈ãaj nu kanatar~…æan sawsawni a masumad, masakaputaj nu ƒßitajan sawni masumad tu ku kakitidaan, u siƒßu ƒßina pinaaj a r~…æipajan patid…ô≈ã tu ar~…æaƒßi ¶an b…ôr~…æiƒß…ôn tu. . itida i ¶ajr~…æim tupi ¶ miƒß ¶aan r~…æuo-ma-s…ô tajdan nu s…ôn-s…ô≈ã-r~…æuo-ma tikuo a ƒßitaj mid…ôbu≈ã, ujni nu ¶ajtu a s…ô ¶ian sajawaj nu r~…æuo-ma d…ôbu≈ãan nu d…ô-ji- ¶…ô a ƒßitajja. ka ¶inr~…æawan a r~…æuo-ma ma ¶ima ¶ian maƒßida u fu-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô atu z…ô î~ °-naj-ja mar~…æ…ô ¶adtu a d…ôbu≈ãan, ami ¶a ¶i ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi itida i fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô pid…ôbu≈ãa mapatajtu i tawja. nika i maƒßiniaj a nikaudipaj, nika ¶i ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi idaw ku nipaƒßabaj nida tu sakaj kitakida u sakasikawawan a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô atu nuƒßitajan a tin…ô≈ãan. ***** . itida i ¶ajsip siwsip miƒß ¶aan, mikuwanaj tu fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô …ôn…ôm a bataan a maj-ti- ¶i- ¶ia- ¶u kab…ôr~…æinna tu, kir~…æur~…æ sa miwawi…ôsaj u ¶iw- ¶un ja-r~…æi-san-ta r~…æius…ô a siws…ô ¶i sa-fuo-na-r~…æuo-r~…æa patid…ô≈ã tu kunƒß…ôkuo, mir~…æir~…æidaj makaar~…æa tu s…ôpataj a miƒß ¶aan, mi ¶id…ôk ku nipikuwan ni sa-fuo-na-r~…æu-r~…æa, misawa ¶u tu binawr~…æa, b…ôr~…æin…ô≈ã nutaw, tuduƒß…ôn nutaw sa mapataj. nikuda ¶i suo-d…ô-r~…æi-ni ku pa ¶i ¶i mikuwan tu fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô kunƒß…ôkuo. ******, . ¶ajsip siwwar~…æ miƒß ¶an ¶i ma- ¶i-ja-wi-r~…æi mar~…æa fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô kunƒß…ôkuo sakatusa a sakakaaj, mikawaw tu kunƒß…ôkuo sakar~…æiƒßar~…æaj nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu tad…ômawan nu misu, tamudu≈ã…ôn nida ku sasakaj putaƒß atu ƒßitaj, ƒßina taƒß…ôkar~…æ i nutawan a kanatar~…æan, jadaƒß tu ku nikar~…æit…ômuƒßan nida tu mir~…æir~…æidaj tu kanatar~…æan a tad…ômawan, sisa mar~…æa fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô sakakaaj kanamuƒßan a tad…ômawan. maadiƒß nida ku fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô a ƒßitaj ¶aaj ka k…ôr~…æ…ô ¶ ku nipikuwan, patid…ô≈ã tu kanatar~…æaj a tad…ômaw mar~…æaƒßitaj. **** . ¶ajr~…æim s…ôpr~…æim miƒß ¶aan fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô miƒßa≈ã patid…ô≈ã tu kuomin ƒßitaj, patid…ô≈ã tu kuomin siwa nu tad…ômaw mituduaj a wijun, ¶i ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi mar~…æa misu, ¶ajr~…æim s…ôpn…ôm patid…ô≈ã tu adidiaj nu ƒßitajan mid…ôbu≈ã tu pi-sa a kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, mir~…æir~…æid tu ƒßitaj, tajda miu ¶ur~…æ mar~…æ…ôpa ¶aw, sadikudaj ¶ajr~…æim s…ôpsiw miƒß ¶aan u pi-sa mikusa≈ã tu fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô. **** . itini i s…ôn-s…ôn î~ °-r~…æuo-ma-ti î~ °-kuo ƒßunti atu ¶iw ¶un masasuutiiƒß, ta ¶uwa ¶uwa musakau, ma≈ãar~…æaj par~…æukapaƒß, ¶aaj papir~…æiƒßidaai ¶i fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô tu sakajpa ¶aw, mi ¶unus tu sakaj tuudan nu kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan. imaƒßini idaw ka tin…ô≈ãan ni ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi tu …ô î~ °-ta-r~…æi a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶iw atu ƒßitaj ¶i ¶…ôi-sa-r~…æia.puo- ¶i-ja, madat…ô≈ã nida ku namaka bar~…æu ¶uaj nida misaaƒß…ôbuar~…æ tu r~…æar~…æa î~ ° mi ¶ukajmas a tuudan tu sapikuwanan, maƒß…ôm…ôk ¶i nida. . katukuƒß satu tu ¶ajr~…æim ¶ajtu miƒß ¶aan war~…æu a bur~…æat tajdani ni ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi i pi-sa, nikajdaan tu kaƒßi ¶aƒßi ¶a nu sasibutan nu r~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, ¶i maj-ti- ¶i r~…æumaan itida i zu-r~…æ…ôa …ôs…ô a ƒßitaj ni…ôdapan mid…ôbu≈ã tu fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô, kunƒß…ôkuo mar~…æawp…ôs tu. ¶i ¶ia-fan-ni.maj-ti- ¶i mar~…æa fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô takun, naw mar~…æasakakaaj nu kunƒß…ôkuo a ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi par~…æawp…ôs…ôn tu ku buis nida, itini i ¶ajr~…æim ¶ajr~…æu miƒß ¶aan miƒßantajan ku ¶umi nida ku sakapur~…æur~…æ, sawa ¶u…ôn mutiik, sadikudaj pataƒß…ôkar~…æ…ôn pakunida ƒßan paƒßuti≈ã. . nai î~ ° tu ku ¶an ¶anan nida i tawja, tida satu ¶i nida i fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô mibatad tu pitu a nabatadan a s…ôn-an-d…ô-r~…æi-ja mu…ôn…ô≈ã, mar~…æi≈ãatu misur~…æit tu ¶udad, idaw ku nipati≈ãami nida tu ¶abajan nida sakamusa: "sa≈ãsa≈ãd…ôp, makatukuƒß kaku i r~…æuma î~ ° nu sapisur~…æit a takar~…æan, ¶umud sakaku ƒßur~…æak…ôn nu maku ku sianabuƒßaj a sakir~…æiwmaƒß nu maku a diku ¶an, par~…æijun…ôn nu maku tu sakaj siidaaj a diku ¶an, maƒßida u tar~…æumaaj ja ¶a kaku i kuntin, mar~…æit…ômuƒß nu maku ku nar~…æit…ômuƒßan a tad…ômaw, u nika namuƒß nu ƒß…ôni i takuwan, pataƒß…ôkar~…æ tu nu ¶a ¶ajaj a kakan…ôn. . pakunida sa kaku masasakamu atu nu ƒß…ôni, par~…æita tu nu ƒß…ônian tu sakaj ¶…ôn ¶…ô a kawawan, kapaƒß ku nipatub…ôr~…æi nuƒß…ôni i takuwan, nai î~ ° ku ≈ã…ôr~…æu≈ã…ôr~…æu î~ ° a ¶a nu maku, ƒßamin…ôn nu maku mipawan ku ¶ak…ônuƒß. u pakuju ¶ nai î~ ° ku bijar~…æaw nu maku, mir~…æabu kaku tu siidaaj nu taƒßudan a kitakidan, na sakamusa ¶i dan-kun : " ninanaman a tin…ô≈ã sipakaj bar~…æu ¶u î~ °…ôn, duma a kawawan nai î~ ° tu ku r~…æaƒß…ô ¶i sa. . itida ¶i nida i "fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô-s…ôi" musakamu tu tawjaaj a fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô tad…ômaw, " u nikasidiku ¶an tu d…ômid…ômiadan, mikir~…æiƒßar~…æaj tu tuas nuƒß…ôni, idumaan tu nipar~…æawp…ôsan ma ¶unus, pida≈ãan tu nipataƒß…ôkar~…æ tu kar~…æisiw, tasar~…æamaan atu sakaj tatajnaan a d…ômiadan atu kar~…æisiwan ma ¶unus, nuƒß…ôni a mukti ma≈ãar~…æaj misakapaƒß tu nikasidiku ¶an, kja kapaƒß ku wajwaj a musakamu. ¶ima ku satin…ô≈ãaj a mipaduka ¶i nidaan, ¶ima tu ku satin…ô≈ãaj a tad…ômawan sa. ¶ajr~…æim tupi ¶ miƒß ¶aan, fuo-r~…æu-r~…æun-s…ô masasu≈ãaaj tu kun-ƒß…ô, ¶i ma- ¶i-wi-r~…æi ma≈ãar~…æaj pakakapaƒß tu fuo-r~…æu-r~…æun-s…ô kunƒß…ôkuo, nika namisakapaƒß ƒß…ônaj tu maj-ti- ¶i a r~…æuma î~ °an, ¶aaj k…ôdai nu kun-ƒß…ô-kuo, sadikuda ƒßida satu mapataj r~…æima a bataan idaw ku war~…æu nu miƒß ¶aan nida i dawja. *****, .
S.FORM: = Ni-ku-luo. Ma-ci-wi-liÂ∞ºÂè§Ê¥õ¬∑È¶¨Âü∫Á∂≠Âà© = nikaudipÁîüÊ∂Ø pilecuhan ni Ma-ci-wi-li itida i E'-ta-li' Fuo-luo-lun-se, u binkusi ku wama nida i tawya, tusa ku kakana cacay ku sabama. caay ka tineng ku aydaay a tademaw tu ci Ma-ci-wi-li a wawa nu waywayan, nika kapahay ku nicudadan nida tu La-tin-wen atu E'-ta-li-wen a nikuwyikuan. . sassing i Fuo-luo-lun-se a Ma-ci-wi-li pilecuhan ni Ma-ci-wi-li kalawlawan i tawya, u Ciw-cun-kuo u satabakiay nu hitayan, sasiidaay a E'-ta'-li Cen-pan hacacay han nu icelangay a kanatalan mahida u Fa-kuo, Si-pan-ya atu Sen-seng-Luo-ma-ti-kuo debungan. tawyaay nu icelangay nu kanatalan sawsawni a masumad, masakaputay nu hitayan sawni masumad tu ku kakitidaan, u sihu hina pinaay a lipayan patideng tu alahican belihen tu. . itida i caylim tupic mihcaan Luo-ma-se taydan nu Sen-seng-luo-ma tikuo a hitay midebung, uyni nu caytu a secian sayaway nu Luo-ma debungan nu De-yi-ce a hitayya. kacinlawan a Luo-ma macimacian mahida u Fu-luo-lun-se atu Ze'-nay-ya malecadtu a debungan, amica ci Ma-ci-wi-li itida i Fuo-luo-lun-se pidebunga mapataytu i tawya. nika i mahiniay a nikaudipay, nika ci Ma-ci-wi-li idaw ku nipahabay nida tu sakay kitakida u sakasikawawan a cen-ce atu nuhitayan a tinengan. Âú®1527 . itida i caysip siwsip mihcaan, mikuwanay tu Fuo-luo-lun-se enem a bataan a May-ti-ci-cia-cu kabelinna tu, kilul sa miwawiesay u Ciw-cun Ya-li-san-ta liuse a siwse ci Sa-fuo-na-luo-la patideng tu kunhekuo, mililiday makaala tu sepatay a mihcaan, micidek ku nipikuwan ni Sa-fuo-na-lu-la, misawacu tu binawla, belineng nutaw, tuduhen nutaw sa mapatay. nikuda ci Suo-de-li-ni ku pacici mikuwan tu Fuo-luo-lun-se kunhekuo. Âú®1494Âπ¥, . caysip siwwal mihcan ci Ma-ci-ya-wi-li mala Fuo-luo-lun-se kunhekuo sakatusa a sakakaay, mikawaw tu kunhekuo sakalihalay nu cacay a bataan nu tademawan nu misu, tamudungen nida ku sasakay putah atu hitay, hina tahekal i nutawan a kanatalan, yadah tu ku nikalitemuhan nida tu mililiday tu kanatalan a tademawan, sisa mala Fuo-luo-lun-se sakakaay kanamuhan a tademawan. maadih nida ku Fuo-luo-lun-se a hitay caay ka kelec ku nipikuwan, patideng tu kanatalay a tademaw malahitay. 1498 . caylim seplim mihcaan Fuo-luo-lun-se mihang patideng tu kuomin hitay, patideng tu kuomin siwa nu tademaw mituduay a wiyun, ci Ma-ci-wi-li mala misu, caylim sepnem patideng tu adidiay nu hitayan midebung tu Pi-sa a kalepacawan, mililid tu hitay, tayda miucul malepacaw, sadikuday caylim sepsiw mihcaan u Pi-sa mikusang tu Fuo-luo-lun-se. 1505 . itini i Sen-sen'-luo-ma-ti'-kuo hunti atu ciwcun masasuutiih, tacuwacuwa musakau, mangalay palukapah, caay papilihidaai ci Fuo-luo-lun-se tu sakaypacaw, micunus tu sakay tuudan nu kalepacawan. imahini idaw ka tinengan ni Ma-ci-wi-li tu E'-ta-li a cen-ce-ciw atu hitay ci Cei-sa-lia.puo-ci-ya, madateng nida ku namaka balucuay nida misaahebual tu lala' micukaymas a tuudan tu sapikuwanan, mahemek ci nida. . katukuh satu tu caylim caytu mihcaan walu a bulat taydani ni Ma-ci-wi-li i Pi-sa, nikaydaan tu kahicahica nu sasibutan nu lepacawan, ci May-ti-ci lumaan itida i Zu-lea ese a hitay niedapan midebung tu Fuo-luo-lun-se, kunhekuo malawpes tu. ci Cia-fan-ni.May-ti-ci mala Fuo-luo-lun-se takun, naw malasakakaay nu kunhekuo a Ma-ci-wi-li palawpesen tu ku buis nida, itini i caylim caylu mihcaan mihantayan ku cumi nida ku sakapulul, sawacuen mutiik, sadikuday patahekalen pakunida han pahuting. . nai' tu ku cancanan nida i tawya, tida satu ci nida i Fuo-luo-lun-se mibatad tu pitu a nabatadan a Sen-an-de-li-ya mueneng, malingatu misulit tu cudad, idaw ku nipatingami nida tu cabayan nida sakamusa: "sangsangdep, makatukuh kaku i luma' nu sapisulit a takalan, cumud sakaku hulaken nu maku ku sianabuhay a sakiliwmah nu maku a dikucan, paliyunen nu maku tu sakay siidaay a dikucan, mahida u talumaay yaca kaku i kuntin, malitemuh nu maku ku nalitemuhan a tademaw, u nika namuh nu heni i takuwan, patahekal tu nu cacayay a kakanen. . pakunida sa kaku masasakamu atu nu heni, palita tu nu henian tu sakay cence a kawawan, kapah ku nipatubeli nuheni i takuwan, nai' ku ngelungelu' aca nu maku, haminen nu maku mipawan ku cakenuh. u pakuyuc nai' ku biyalaw nu maku, milabu kaku tu siidaay nu tahudan a kitakidan, na sakamusa ci Dan-kun : " ninanaman a tineng sipakay balucu'en, duma a kawawan nai' tu ku laheci sa. . itida ci nida i "fuo-luo-lun-se-sei" musakamu tu tawyaay a fuo-luo-lun-se tademaw, " u nikasidikucan tu demidemiadan, mikilihalay tu tuas nuheni, idumaan tu nipalawpesan macunus, pidangan tu nipatahekal tu kalisiw, tasalamaan atu sakay tataynaan a demiadan atu kalisiwan macunus, nuheni a mukti mangalay misakapah tu nikasidikucan, kya kapah ku wayway a musakamu. cima ku satinengay a mipaduka ci nidaan, cima tu ku satinengay a tademawan sa. caylim tupic mihcaan, Fuo-lu-lun-se masasungaay tu kun-he, ci Ma-ci-wi-li mangalay pakakapah tu Fuo-lu-lun-se kunhekuo, nika namisakapah henay tu May-ti-ci a luma'an, caay kedai nu kun-he-kuo, sadikuda hida satu mapatay lima a bataan idaw ku walu nu mihcaan nida i dawya. 1527Âπ¥, .
